name: Spirit 12x12 Horse Paddock Plan - An Open Run-In Shelter for Shade, Freedom & Simplicity
open_features: 12x12 Open Horse Paddock with Sloped Roof
A simple lean-to roof provides dependable sun and rain protection while maintaining an open, stress-free environment for horses.
Four-post construction allows horses to enter and exit freely from all sides, promoting natural movement and excellent ventilation.
Straightforward framing, minimal materials, and clean lines make this paddock ideal for DIY builders, ranch owners, and homesteaders.
Exposed timber framing delivers a classic, functional look that pairs perfectly with fencing, barns, and rural settings.
description_summary: Kickstart your pasture upgrade with the Spirit Horse Paddock Plan - a 12x12 open run-in shelter designed for horses that thrive with space, airflow, and unobstructed access. Featuring a clean single-slope roof, sturdy timber posts, and a fully open layout, Spirit delivers essential shade and weather protection without confinement. Whether you're building a horse shade structure, feeding area, turnout paddock, or a flexible livestock shelter, the Spirit 12x12 offers straightforward constructio...
